def solve(nums, queries)
    MOD = 10**9 + 7
    n = nums.length
    p = Array.new(n, 1)
    queries.each do |li, ri, ki, vi|
        current_idx = li
        while current_idx <= ri
            p[current_idx] = (p[current_idx] * vi) % MOD
            current_idx += ki
        end
    end
    result = 0
    nums.each_with_index do |num, i|
        result ^= (num * p[i]) % MOD
    end
    result
end
